ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Unique email address for each player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Secure password for each player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role indicator (e.g., player, coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the player's profile picture */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the organization */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date the player retired, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game type */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season or time period for the statistics */,
  "player_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "addas" INTEGER /* Total ADDAs (average dart throws) */,
  "avg_501" REAL /* Average score in the 501 game */,
  "high_in" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved in a game */,
  "high_out" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved when starting with a double */,
  "double_in_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful double-in attempts */,
  "double_out_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful double-out attempts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "game_rules" TEXT /* Brief description of the game rules */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
